name: 二元一次方程组
subject: math
curriculum_points:
SL 3.2
Content Guidance, clarification and syllabus links
Use of sine, cosine and tangent ratios to find the sides and angles of right-angled triangles. In all areas of this topic, students should be encouraged to sketch well-labelled diagrams to support their solutions.
Link to: inverse functions (SL2.2) when finding angles.

SL 3.3
Content Guidance, clarification and syllabus links
Applications of right and non-right angled trigonometry, including Pythagoras’s theorem.
Angles of elevation and depression.
Construction of labelled diagrams from written statements.
